---
title: "disable_stragglers.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\disable_stragglers.js"
loc: 25
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 8.94
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.15
---

## Intent
The `disable_stragglers.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on addDisable, content, socket. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via addDisable, content, socket. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `addDisable`
- `content`
- `socket`
